basic_details.job_title: District Education Office Bastar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 04 Yoga/ Sports c Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Samagra Shiksha, Bastar (District Education Officer-cum-District Project Officer, Samagra Shiksha Madhyamik, Bastar)
basic_details.short_information: The District Education Office (Samagra Shiksha), Bastar, Chhattisgarh, has released recruitment notices for the post of Yoga/Khel Shikshak-Prashikshak (Yoga/Sports instructors-Trainer) under the PM Shri scheme for the academic session 2026-27. The vacancies are spread across four PM Shri schools in Bastar district. This article summarizes the official notification details exactly as published, including eligibility, age limit, salary, selection process, and the application procedure.

age_limit.age_details: Temporary/contractual, for the approved session only
age_limit.age_relaxation: Available as per applicable government rules; a certificate from a competent authority is mandatory to claim relaxation. Exact relaxation quantum is not mentioned in the notification.

qualification.details: As per all four notifications, the mandatory minimum educational qualification for the post is the same: | Graduate degree in Physical Education, and Graduate degree in a field related to Yoga Education | Additionally:

vacancy_details.School Name: PM Shri Vidyalaya – Swami Atmanand Govt. Excellent English Medium School, Karpawand (SEJES Karpawand)
PM Shri Vidyalaya – Swami Atmanand Govt. Excellent English Medium School, Lohandiguda (SEJES Lohandiguda)
PM Shri Primary School, Girls Ashram, Baregumiyapal
PM Shri Vidyalaya – Swami Atmanand Govt. Excellent English Medium School, Bastar (PM Shri SEJES Bastar)

PM Shri Vidyalaya – Swami Atmanand Govt. Excellent English Medium School, Lohandiguda (SEJES Lohandiguda)

category_wise_vacancy.School Name: PM Shri Vidyalaya – Swami Atmanand Govt. Excellent English Medium School, Bastar (PM Shri SEJES Bastar)

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be paid a maximum lump-sum honorarium of Rs. 10,000 per month (Rupees Ten Thousand only), as stated in all four notifications.

selection_process: Post Graduate Qualification Marks Experience Marks (Max. 10)

Yoga/Khel Shikshak-Prashikshak 90% weightage of marks obtained in graduation (minimum qualification: Graduate degree in Physical Education and Graduate degree in a field related to Yoga Education) 1 year experience = 3 marks 2 years experience = 6 marks 3 years or more experience = 10 marks
Selection is done at the school level based on merit
with final decision-making authority resting with the District Selection Committee. Marks are awarded out of a total of 100
as per the following table given in the notification:
Selection will be made purely on merit. If a selected candidate does not join the post
the next candidate will be selected from the waiting list based on merit marks. Police verification will be conducted; service can be terminated if the candidate is found guilty in verification.
how_to_apply: The application process is offline and identical across all four notifications:
Obtain and fill the prescribed application form (format provided along with each school's notification).
Attach self-attested photocopies of all required educational and other certificates.
Enclose two envelopes, each affixed with a Rs. 10 postage stamp, with the applicant's current address clearly written on them.
Submit the completed application in person at the office of the concerned school, during office hours (excluding holidays), before the last date.
Applications received after the due date and time will not be considered under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Reference Letters Cited in the Notification
content_sections.text: State Project Office, Samagra Shiksha Chhattisgarh, Raipur - Letter No. 821/SS/PM-SHRI/Yoga Shikshak/2026, dated 05.06.2026 District Education Officer-cum-District Project Officer, Samagra Shiksha Madhyamik, Bastar - Letter No. 695/Samagra Shiksha/PMSHRI/2026-27, Jagdalpur, dated 07.07.2026

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Note: The exact office-hour cut-off time for submission is handwritten on the original notices and is not clearly legible in all copies. Applicants are strongly advised to confirm the exact closing time directly with the concerned school office or the official Bastar district website before submitting their application.

rows.school_notice: PM Shri Primary School (Girls Ashram) Baregumiyapal (Advt No. 117)

rows.last_date_to_apply: Not mentioned in the official notification (left blank on the notice)

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details (School-wise)
content_sections.text: Total advertised posts across all four notifications: 4 (one post per school).

content_sections.heading: Eligibility & Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: As per all four notifications, the mandatory minimum educational qualification for the post is the same: Graduate degree in Physical Education, and Graduate degree in a field related to Yoga Education Additionally:

rows.details: Available as per applicable government rules; a certificate from a competent authority is mandatory to claim relaxation. Exact relaxation quantum is not mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Honorarium
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be paid a maximum lump-sum honorarium of Rs. 10,000 per month (Rupees Ten Thousand only), as stated in all four notifications.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process & Marks Distribution
content_sections.text: Selection is done at the school level based on merit, with final decision-making authority resting with the District Selection Committee. Marks are awarded out of a total of 100, as per the following table given in the notification: Selection will be made purely on merit. If a selected candidate does not join the post, the next candidate will be selected from the waiting list based on merit marks. Police verification will be conducted; service can be terminated if the candidate is found guilty in verification.

rows.graduate_qualification_marks: 90% weightage of marks obtained in graduation (minimum qualification: Graduate degree in Physical Education and Graduate degree in a field related to Yoga Education)
rows.experience_marks_max_10: 1 year experience = 3 marks 2 years experience = 6 marks 3 years or more experience = 10 marks

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Self-attested photocopies of all educational certificates (must be clear, otherwise the application will be rejected) Class 10th marksheet (for age proof) Proof of live registration with the Employment Office (Rozgar Karyalay) Caste certificate, if applicable Age relaxation certificate from competent authority, if claiming relaxation No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the current employer, if the applicant is already employed in any department/office Original documents must be produced at the time of document verification (only for verification, not for submission with the application)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: The application process is offline and identical across all four notifications: Obtain and fill the prescribed application form (format provided along with each school's notification). Attach self-attested photocopies of all required educational and other certificates. Enclose two envelopes, each affixed with a Rs. 10 postage stamp, with the applicant's current address clearly written on them. Submit the completed application in person at the office of the concerned school, during office hours (excluding holidays), before the last date. Applications received after the due date and time will not be considered under any circumstances.

rows.address_to_send_application: Office of the Principal, PM Shri Vidyalaya Swami Atmanand Shas. Utkrishta Angreji Madhyam Vidyalaya, Karpawand (SEJES Karpawand), Vikaskhand Bakawand, District Bastar (C.G.)
Office of the Principal, PM Shri Vidyalaya Swami Atmanand Shas. Utkrishta Angreji Madhyam Vidyalaya, Lohandiguda (SEJES Lohandiguda), Vikaskhand Lohandiguda, District Bastar (C.G.)
Office of the Head Teacher, PM Shri Vidyalaya Shas. Prathmik Shala Kanya Ashram Baregumiyapal, District Bastar (C.G.)
Office of the Principal, PM Shri Vidyalaya Swami Atmanand Shas. Utkrishta Angreji Madhyam Vidyalaya (SEJES Bastar), Vikaskhand Bastar, District Bastar (C.G.)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PM Shri Yoga/ Sports instructors recruitment 2026 in Bastar?
faq.answer: For the Karpawand, Lohandiguda, and Baregumiyapal schools, the last date to apply is 31.07.2026. For the Bastar school notice, the last date is not mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The application is offline only. Candidates must submit the filled application form in person at the concerned school's office during office hours.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for this post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates receive a lump-sum honorarium of Rs. 10,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required educational qualification?
faq.answer: A graduate degree in Physical Education along with a graduate degree in a field related to Yoga Education is mandatory.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit?
faq.answer: Minimum 21 years and maximum 40 years as on 01 January 2026, with age relaxation available as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the notification.
